info.title: SkillCorner API
info.description:
SkillCorner API Documentation
Find glossary and additional material at https://skillcorner.crunch.help/en

Some API parameters accept multiple integer or string values separated by commas in the URL (e.g., `?competition=1,2,3`).
In this documentation, enter each ID as a separate value, and the API will combine them into a single parameter.

get.description: This endpoint returns Game Intelligence V1 data and metrics, based on a previous computation logic and data model. This version is no longer generated for new matches. Use [`/metrics/game_intelligence/out_of_possession/on_ball_engagements`](/api/docs#/metrics/metrics_game_intelligence_out_of_possession_on_ball_engagements_list) to access Game Intelligence V2.

parameters.name: match
parameters.description:
SkillCorner Match ID(s).
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas.

parameters.name: competition_edition
parameters.description:
SkillCorner Competition Edition ID(s).
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas.

parameters.name: group_by
parameters.description: The comma-separated group by values.

parameters.name: file_format
parameters.description: The format of the file.

parameters.name: playing_time__gte
parameters.description: The minimum playing time.

parameters.name: count_match__gte
parameters.description: The minimum number of matches.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The initial index from which to return the results.

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description: Language of the results

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: Filters on authorization level of user.

parameters.name: component_permission_for
parameters.description:
Filters on authorization level of user for a specific component. 

Available values : all, physical, tracking, gi_in_possession, gi_out_of_possession

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The initial index from which to return the results.

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description: Language of the results

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: Filters on authorization level of user.

parameters.name: component_permission_for
parameters.description:
Filters on authorization level of user for a specific component. 

Available values : all, physical, tracking, gi_in_possession, gi_out_of_possession

get.description: All rounds for a competition

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.description: The initial index from which to return the results.

parameters.name: match
parameters.description:
SkillCorner Match ID(s).
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas.

parameters.name: competition_edition

This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas.

parameters.name: match
parameters.description:
SkillCorner Match ID(s).
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas.

parameters.name: competition_edition
parameters.description:
SkillCorner Competition Edition ID(s).
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas.

parameters.name: feed_type
parameters.description: Filter by custom feed type. Accepted values: tactical, clean_feed, broadcast.

get.description: This endpoint returns Game Intelligence V1 data and metrics, based on a previous computation logic and data model. This version is no longer generated for new matches. Use [`/metrics/game_intelligence/in_possession/off_ball_runs/`](/api/docs#/metrics/metrics_game_intelligence_in_possession_off_ball_runs_list) to access Game Intelligence V2.

parameters.name: season
parameters.description:
SkillCorner Season ID(s).
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas.

parameters.name: competition
parameters.description:
SkillCorner Competition ID(s).
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas.

parameters.name: competition_edition
parameters.description:
SkillCorner Competition Edition ID(s).
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas.

parameters.name: match
parameters.description:
SkillCorner Match ID(s).
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas.

parameters.name: team
parameters.description:
SkillCorner Team ID(s).
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas.

parameters.name: player
parameters.description:
SkillCorner Player ID(s).
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas.

parameters.name: date__lte
parameters.description: Match date before the date.

parameters.name: date__gte
parameters.description: Match date after the date.

parameters.name: group
parameters.description:
Position group.
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas. 

Available values : CentralDefender, FullBack, Midfield, WideAttacker, CenterForward

parameters.name: role
parameters.description:
Player role acronym. This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas. 

Available values : GK, LCB, CB, RCB, LWB, LB, RB, RWB, LDM, DM, RDM, LM, CM, RM, AM, LW, RW, LF, RF, CF, SUB

parameters.name: age__lte
parameters.description: Exclude players older than this number.

parameters.name: age__gte
parameters.description: Exclude players younger than this number.

parameters.name: results
parameters.description:
Result of the game.
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas.

parameters.name: venue
parameters.description: home or/and away separated by comma.

parameters.name: playing_time__gte
parameters.description: Exclude match-player on which player played less than this number (in minutes).

parameters.name: count_match__gte
parameters.description: Exclude metrics computed based on less than this number of player matches.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Filter the metrics on a specific channel of the pitch.

parameters.name: third
parameters.description: Filter the metrics on a specific third of the pitch.

parameters.name: run_type
parameters.description:
Get metrics for one or several run types. “all” means without any distinction between the run types.
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas. 

Available values : all, run_in_behind, run_ahead_of_the_ball, support_run, pulling_wide_run, coming_short_run, underlap_run, overlap_run, dropping_off_run, pulling_half_space_run, cross_receiver_run

parameters.name: average_per
parameters.description: Specify how you want to average the metrics.

parameters.name: group_by
parameters.description:
Specify the aggregation level you want.
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas.

parameters.description:
Get metrics for one or several pressure intensities. “all” means without any distinction between the pressure intensities.
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas. 

Available values : all, low, medium, high

Specify the aggregation level you want.

get.description: Get aggregated dynamic events.

parameters.name: file_format
parameters.description:
Format of the file. 

Available values : csv, sportscode-xml, matchtracker-xml, focus-json

parameters.name: period_starts
parameters.description: The comma-separated video start seconds of the two match halves.

parameters.name: ignore_dynamic_events_check
parameters.description:
**WARNING!** Setting this parameter to `true` enables access to Dynamic Events even if the Dynamic Event quality check has not been passed for the match. By doing so, you may receive data that does not meet our usual quality standards.
**We recommend being cautious and always checking the match's data quality status via the `data_collection` endpoint before using this data for critical analysis.**

parameters.name: feed_type
parameters.description: Video feed type for custom provider data. If not specified, will try in priority order: tactical > clean_feed > broadcast.

get.description: Download file with tracking data for a given match.

parameters.name: file_format
parameters.description:
Format of the downloaded file.
 It can be a jsonlines, where each line is a full parsable json, or Fifa format which is composed by two files : a .xml for metadata, and a .txt for data (for details : https://www.fifa.com/technical/football-technology/standards/epts/research-development-epts-standard-data-format)

parameters.name: data_version
parameters.description:
Version of the data to download.
 Version 3 is the current version.

parameters.name: feed_type
parameters.description: Video feed type for custom provider data. If not specified, will try in priority order: tactical > clean_feed > broadcast.

get.description: Get aggregated dynamic events.

parameters.name: file_format
parameters.description:
Format of the file. 

Available values : csv, sportscode-xml, matchtracker-xml, focus-json

parameters.name: period_starts
parameters.description: The comma-separated video start seconds of the two match halves.

parameters.name: ignore_dynamic_events_check
parameters.description:
**WARNING!** Setting this parameter to `true` enables access to Dynamic Events even if the Dynamic Event quality check has not been passed for the match. By doing so, you may receive data that does not meet our usual quality standards.
**We recommend being cautious and always checking the match's data quality status via the `data_collection` endpoint before using this data for critical analysis.**

Version of the data to download.
 Version 3 is the current version.

parameters.description: The initial index from which to return the results.

This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas.

get.description: Main endpoint for requesting SkillCorner GI off ball runs metrics.

parameters.name: season
parameters.description:
SkillCorner Season ID(s).
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas.

parameters.name: competition
parameters.description:
SkillCorner Competition ID(s).
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas.

parameters.name: competition_edition
parameters.description:
SkillCorner Competition Edition ID(s).
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas.

parameters.name: match
parameters.description:
SkillCorner Match ID(s).
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas.

parameters.name: team
parameters.description:
SkillCorner Team ID(s).
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas.

parameters.name: player
parameters.description:
SkillCorner Player ID(s).
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas.

parameters.name: position
parameters.description:
Player position acronym.
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas.
Formerly called role in v2

parameters.name: position_group
parameters.description:
Position group.
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas.
Formerly called group in v2

parameters.name: date__lte
parameters.description: Match date before the date.

parameters.name: date__gte
parameters.description: Match date after the date.

parameters.name: age__lte
parameters.description: Exclude players older than this number.

parameters.name: age__gte
parameters.description: Exclude players younger than this number.

parameters.name: result
parameters.description:
Result of the game.
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas.

parameters.name: venue
parameters.description: home or/and away separated by comma.

parameters.name: playing_time__gte
parameters.description: Includes only performances where playing time is greater than or equal to this value (minutes).

parameters.name: playing_time__lte
parameters.description: Includes only performances where playing time is less than or equal to this value (minutes).

parameters.name: performance_included_count__gte
parameters.description: Includes only metrics computed from at least this number of performances.

parameters.name: group_by
parameters.description: Specifies the aggregation levels used to group results.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of records returned in a single response (page size), 10k record maximum.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of records to skip before returning results (page number x limit).

parameters.name: order_by
parameters.description:
Sorts results by one or more metrics.
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas, each value can be prefixed by a minus sign '-' to order in descending order.

parameters.name: average_per
parameters.description: Defines how metric values are normalized or averaged.

parameters.name: variants
parameters.description: Applies predefined metric variants that expose selected contextual splits of the metrics.

get.description: Main endpoint for requesting SkillCorner physical data.

parameters.name: season
parameters.description:
SkillCorner Season ID(s).
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas.

parameters.name: competition
parameters.description:
SkillCorner Competition ID(s).
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas.

parameters.name: competition_edition
parameters.description:
SkillCorner Competition Edition ID(s).
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas.

parameters.name: match
parameters.description:
SkillCorner Match ID(s).
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas.

parameters.name: team
parameters.description:
SkillCorner Team ID(s).
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas.

parameters.name: player
parameters.description:
SkillCorner Player ID(s).
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas.

parameters.name: position
parameters.description:
Player position acronym.
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas.
Formerly called role in v2

parameters.name: position_group
parameters.description:
Position group.
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas.
Formerly called group in v2

parameters.name: date__lte
parameters.description: Match date before the date.

parameters.name: date__gte
parameters.description: Match date after the date.

parameters.name: age__lte
parameters.description: Exclude players older than this number.

parameters.name: age__gte
parameters.description: Exclude players younger than this number.

parameters.name: playing_time__gte
parameters.description: Exclude match-player on which player played less than this number (in minutes).

parameters.name: count_match__gte
parameters.description: Exclude metrics computed based on less than this number of player matches.

parameters.name: results
parameters.description:
Result of the game.
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas.

parameters.name: venue
parameters.description: home or/and away separated by comma.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: full or/and h1 or/and h2 separated by comma.

parameters.name: possession
parameters.description: all or/and tip or/and otip separated by comma.

parameters.name: physical_check_passed
parameters.description:
If *physical_check_passed=true* API returns only the performances that have passed the SkillCorner physical check.

If *physical_check_passed=false* API returns only the performances that did not pass the SkillCorner physical check.

If *physical_check_passed=true,false* returns all the performances.

Formerly called quality_check in v2

parameters.name: group_by
parameters.description:
Specify the aggregation level you want.
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas.

parameters.name: order_by
parameters.description:
Order performances by a metric queried. Use '-' to order in descending order
Example : '-psv99' let you order by descending PSV-99

parameters.name: response_format
parameters.description: Format of the response.

parameters.name: average_per
parameters.description: Specify the normalization we want to use to compute physical metrics.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Get the next page using the value of the "next" provided in the current page's response.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search on first_name, last_name or nickname.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The initial index from which to return the results.

parameters.name: team
parameters.description:
SkillCorner Team ID(s).
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas.

parameters.name: competition
parameters.description:
SkillCorner Competition ID(s).
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas.

parameters.name: competition_edition
parameters.description:
SkillCorner Competition Edition ID(s).
This parameter accepts multiple values separated by commas.
